title: Birthday of SEC Head of Financial Standards & Corporate Governance
description: L-R.   Director Investment Management Department Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Tunde Kamali, Head Finance and Accouts SEC Mr  Abubakar Gaya, Head Securities and  Investment Services  SEC  Mr S
html: L-R.   Director Investment Management Department Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Tunde Kamali, Head Finance and Accouts SEC Mr  Abubakar Gaya, Head Securities and  Investment Services  SEC  Mr Sa’ad Abdulsalam, The Celebrant  Head Financial Standards and Coorporate Governance SEC Mr Tarfa Makyur and Head External  Relations SEC Mr Mohammed Bagudu during the 50th Birthday Celebration of Mr Tarfa Makyur in Abuja weekend
